sentences.arabic: جَاءَ الصَّيْفُ وَارْتَفَعَتِ الْحَرَارَةُ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljeto je stiglo i temperatura je porasla u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: Summer came and temperatures rose in the city.

sentences.arabic: أَوْصَتِ السُّلُطَاتُ النَّاسَ بِشُرْبِ الْمَاءِ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Vlasti su savjetovale ljude da piju puno vode.
sentences.translationEn: Authorities advised people to drink a lot of water.

sentences.arabic: تَوَجَّهَ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ إِلَى الشَّاطِئِ لِلسِّبَاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi su otišli na plažu da plivaju.
sentences.translationEn: Many people headed to the beach for swimming.

sentences.arabic: نَبَّهَتِ الْجِهَاتُ الصِّحِّيَّةُ مِنَ التَّعَرُّضِ لِلشَّمْسِ طَوِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Zdravstvene vlasti upozorile su na dugo izlaganje suncu.
sentences.translationEn: Health authorities warned against prolonged sun exposure.
